item.title: A Nationwide Book Ban Bill Has Been Introduced in the House of Representatives
item.description: Hours after the State of the Union address, House republicans introduced legislation banning LGBTQ+ books from public schools nationwide.

item.title: What Happened to TV and Movie Novelizations?
item.description: In the 60s and 70s, hundreds of TV and movie novelizations were published every year. What was the appeal, and why are so few published now?

item.title: The Bestselling Books of the Week, According to All the Lists
item.description: USA Today, Publishers Weekly, NYT, Amazon, and Indie Booksellers all have their own bestseller lists. Here are the combined results.

item.title: The Rise of Girls’ Love Across Asia (Plus a Bonus for All Access Members)
item.description: Girls' Love media of all kinds is rising in popularity across Japan, China, Thailand, South Korea, and more.

item.title: New YA Comics and Nonfiction for February 2026
item.description: If you love romantic comics, the new YA releases from February will be your jam. Check out this month's new YA nonfiction and comic releases.
